entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic makeup of crop plants to confer specific traits.

entities.name: CROP PLANTS
entities.description: Plants grown for food or other economic purposes.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand attack by insect pests.

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Insects that cause damage to crops.

entities.name: CROP PROTECTION
entities.description: The practice of managing pests and diseases to protect crop yields.

entities.name: BACILLUS THURINGIENSIS
entities.description: A soil-dwelling bacterium used as a source of toxin genes for pest control.

entities.name: TOXIN GENES
entities.description: Genes that encode proteins toxic to specific insect pests.

entities.name: EXOTIC GENES
entities.description: Genes derived from species outside the target crop species.

entities.name: PLANT-DERIVED GENES
entities.description: Genes derived from other plant species.

entities.name: INSECT CONTROL
entities.description: The management or elimination of insect pests in agriculture.

entities.name: TRANSGENIC CROPS
entities.description: Crops that have been genetically modified to include genes from other species.

entities.name: PEST CONTROL
entities.description: The regulation or management of a pest or pest population.

entities.name: RESISTANCE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process by which insect pests evolve to overcome the resistance traits of a crop.

entities.name: NONTARGET ORGANISMS
entities.description: Organisms that are not the intended target of a pest control measure.

entities.name: ALTERNATE HOST PLANTS
entities.description: Plants other than the main crop that can support the same insect pests.

entities.name: INTROGRESSION OF GENES
entities.description: The movement of genes from transgenic crops into the gene pool of wild relatives.

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES OF CROPS
entities.description: Non-domesticated plants closely related to cultivated crops.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: Agricultural production that is environmentally sound and viable for the long term.
